(d) LESSON FROM MPC: it cleared the gate at midday on RVOL 2.04 + clean trend but was a very low-ATR name (atr_pct ~0.05-0.08), so the +2-ATR partial target (~270.08) and +1.5-ATR trail (~269.98) sat barely above entry; the stop was only ~0.12% below. On such tight-range names a tiny adverse drift stops you out or strands you at break-even with no trail. Consider preferring entries with a bit more ATR headroom so partial/trail triggers are meaningfully reachable intraday.
